nasb.text: and because of the sins of Jeroboam which he sinned, and which he made Israel sin, because of his provocation with which he provoked the Lord God of Israel to anger.

esv.text: It was for the sins of Jeroboam that he sinned and that he made Israel to sin, and because of the anger to which he provoked the Lord, the God of Israel.

cnv.text: 這是因為耶羅波安所犯的罪，和他使以色列人陷在罪中的那罪，又因為他惹動耶和華以色列的　神的怒氣。

ccb.text: 这是因为耶罗波安犯罪，并使以色列人陷入罪中，惹以色列的上帝耶和华发怒。
